text.en: Pain Abilities

All **DRUKHARI** units have a Pain ability, tagged with the word ‘Pain’. Pain abilities only apply to a unit while it is Empowered. If your Army Faction is **DRUKHARI**, you can Empower units from your army with Pain abilities by spending Pain tokens (see below).

**Designer’s Note:** *You can also spend Pain tokens to activate additional effects in certain other rules such as Enhancements and Stratagems.*
Gaining Pain Tokens

If your Army Faction is **DRUKHARI**, you gain Pain tokens as follows:

■ **1 Pain token** at the start of your Command phase.
■ **1 Pain token** each time an enemy unit is destroyed.
■ **1 Pain token** each time an enemy unit fails a Battle‑shock test.

Each time you gain a Pain token, keep it to one side – this is your Pain token pool. Each time you spend a Pain token, reduce your Pain token pool by the same amount.
Empowered Through Pain

Each Pain ability will state when you can spend Pain tokens to Empower that unit. When you do, until the end of the phase, that unit is Empowered and all Pain abilities it has take effect. While an Attached unit is Empowered, the Pain abilities of all Leader and Bodyguard units in that unit take effect – you do not need to spend additional Pain tokens to activate each of those Pain abilities.

**Example**: *At the start of your Charge phase, you spend 1 Pain token to Empower a unit of Wyches. The unit becomes Empowered, and so its Acrobatic Gladiators ability takes effect until the end of the phase. A Succubus is leading the unit, and so its Lithe Agility ability also takes effect until the end of the phase (no additional Pain token is required to activate that ability as well).*

If your Army Faction is **DRUKHARI**, you can include **HARLEQUINS** and **ANHRATHE** units in your army, even though they do not have the **DRUKHARI** Faction keyword. The combined points value of **HARLEQUINS** and/or **ANHRATHE** units you can include in your army depends on the battle size, as follows:

■ **Incursion:** Up to 250 pts
■ **Strike Force:** Up to 500 pts
■ **Onslaught:** Up to 750 pts

No **HARLEQUINS** or **ANHRATHE** models included in your army in this way can be your **WARLORD**, and they cannot be given Enhancements.

At the start of your Command phase, select which Combat Drugs will be active for your army until the start of your next Command phase. To do so, either select one from the list below (you cannot select the same Combat Drug more than once per battle), or randomly select two by rolling two D6. When doing so randomly, Combat Drugs you have previously selected can become active again, but if you randomly select one that is already active for your army, it has no additional effect.
1. Adrenalight
Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by **WYCH CULT** models from your army.
2. Hypex
Add 2" to the Move characteristic of **WYCH CULT** models from your army.
3. Serpentin
Improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee weapons equipped by **WYCH CULT** models from your army by 1.
4. Painbringer
Add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of **WYCH CULT** models from your army.
5. Grave Lotus
Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by **WYCH CULT** models from your army.
6. Splintermind

Improve the Leadership characteristic of **WYCH CULT** models from your army by 1, and improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by **WYCH CULT** models from your army by 1.

text.en: At the start of the first battle round, select one of the Contracts below, then select one unit from your opponent’s army that matches the ‘Contract’ description in that Contract. Until that Contract is completed, that unit is your Contract unit and **KABAL** and **BLADES FOR HIRE** units from your army have the ability stated in that Contract. At the start of your Command phase, if your Contract unit is destroyed, that Contract is completed and you gain 3 Pain tokens.
Trophy Hunters

**Contract:** One **CHARACTER** unit.

**Ability:** Each time a **KABAL** or **BLADES FOR HIRE** model in this unit makes an attack that targets the Contract unit, that attack has the **[PRECISION]** ability.
Sow Fear and Terror

**Contract:** One **INFANTRY** or **MOUNTED** unit (excluding units containing only **CHARACTER** models). At the start of your Command phase, this Contract is completed if all non‑**CHARACTER** models in that unit are destroyed.

**Ability:** Each time a **KABAL** or **BLADES FOR HIRE** model in this unit makes an attack that targets an **INFANTRY** or **MOUNTED** unit, that attack has the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.
Show of Strength

**Contract:** One **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE** unit.

**Ability:** Each time a **KABAL** or **BLADES FOR HIRE** model in this unit makes an attack that targets a **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE** unit, that attack has the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

Each time a **DRUKHARI** unit from your army disembarks from a **TRANSPORT**, until the end of the turn:

■ Ranged weapons equipped by models in that disembarking unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.
■ Melee weapons equipped by models in that disembarking unit have the **[LANCE]** ability.

At the start of the battle, **DRUKHARI** units from your army are winning the wager.

Each time a **DRUKHARI** unit from your army destroys an enemy unit, **DRUKHARI** units from your army are winning the wager.

Each time a **HARLEQUINS** unit from your army destroys an enemy unit, **HARLEQUIN** units from your army are winning the wager.

While **DRUKHARI** units from your army are winning the wager, **HARLEQUIN** units from your army are losing the wager, and vice versa.

Each time a **DRUKHARI** or **HARLEQUINS** model from your army makes an attack, if that model’s unit is winning the wager, re‐roll a Hit roll of 1. If that model’s unit is losing the wager, re‐roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‐roll a Wound roll of 1 instead.

At the start of the battle, you gain 2 Pain tokens for each of the following combinations your army contains (these do not need to be in the same Attached unit):

■ One or more **ARCHON** models and one or more **KABALITE WARRIORS** units.
■ One or more **SUCCUBUS** models and one or more **WYCHES** units.
■ One or more **HAEMONCULUS** models and one or more **WRACKS** units.

**Designer’s Note:** *These are all cumulative, so if your army contains at least one of all of the combinations listed above, you start the battle with 6 Pain tokens.*

text.ja: 味方魔女団・ユニットの白兵攻撃は［会心ヒット：モンスター/ビークルではない］を持つ。 このデタッチメントは魔女団のタグを持ち、別の魔女団タグを持つデタッチメントと同時に編制できない。

text.zh: 己方巫灵教派单位的近战攻击拥有[致命一击：非凶兽/载具]。 本分遣队拥有巫灵教派标签，并且不能与另一个拥有巫灵教派标签的分遣队被一同纳入军队中。

target.en: One **DRUKHARI** unit from your army that made a Charge move this turn and has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability. If your unit is a **WYCHES** unit, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1 as well.

fluff.en: Imitating Lelith Hesperax, these warriors begin their gladiatorial bout with an opening so spectacularly violent that none can fail to be impressed.

target.en: One **WYCH CULT** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

fluff.en: Moving so quickly they seem to blur, the Wyches evade incoming fire with contemptuous elegance.

target.en: One **DRUKHARI** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If your Contract unit is destroyed as a result of those attacks, every unit in your opponent’s army must take a Battle‑shock test. You cannot gain more than 3 Pain tokens as a result of failed Battle‑shock tests caused by this Stratagem.

fluff.en: Borne away screaming into the shadows, everyone knows these unfortunates face a dreadful fate.

target.en: One **KABALITE WARRIORS** or **HAND OF THE ARCHON** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, improve the Ballistic Skill and Armour Penetration characteristics of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1.

fluff.en: Whether seeking to impress a watching Archon, show up rivals or revel in their supremacy, these marksmen fire for spiteful effect.

target.en: One **DRUKHARI** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase and that disembarked from a **TRANSPORT** this turn.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability, or the **[SUSTAINED HITS 2]** ability if your unit is a **KABALITE WARRIORS** or **HAND OF THE ARCHON** unit.

fluff.en: These warriors are well versed in raining suppressing fire on the foe even as they close with them from on high, shredding defences and leaving the survivors easy prey for the raid.

target.en: One **DRUKHARI** or **HARLEQUINS** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Select **[LETHAL HITS]** or **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]**. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability.

fluff.en: Jealous competition descends into frenzied carnage as the kill count climbs higher and the intoxicating screams of the dying fill the air.

target.en: One **DRUKHARI** or **HARLEQUINS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

fluff.en: In bounding leaps and graceful pirouettes, the cavalcade of capricious killers bounds through hails of fire, cackling gleefully as they come.

target.en: One **DRUKHARI** unit from your army (excluding **HAEMONCULUS COVENS** units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Even attempting to strike the Drukhari is like trying to lay a blade to smoke, so sly and swift are they.

target.en: Up to two **DRUKHARI BATTLELINE** units from your army, or one other **DRUKHARI** unit from your army.

when.en: Start of your Shooting phase or the start of the Fight phase.

effect.en: You can spend 1 Pain token. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in each of those units makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is Below Half‑strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If you spent 1 Pain token, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

fluff.en: It is hardwired into the Drukhari psyche to prey upon weakened and suffering victims.

target.en: Up to two **WYCHES** units from your army, or one other **DRUKHARI** unit from your army, that have not been selected to move this phase.

when.en: Start of your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time one of those units Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit (this is not cumulative with the **REAVERS**’ Matchless Swiftness ability).

fluff.en: The exhilarating promise of bloodshed goads these warriors into battle with preternatural haste.

target.en: One **DRUKHARI** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Spend 1 Pain Token. Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. At the end of the phase, if your unit is still on the battlefield and it is a **HAEMONCULUS COVENS** unit, you gain 1 Pain Token.

fluff.en: These epicureans of extreme sensation revel in their agonies as much as those of the foe.

target.en: One friendly unengaged **WYCH CULT** unit that is within 6" of that enemy unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a **fall‑back move**.

effect.en: Declare a charge with your unit. When selecting **charge targets**, you can only select enemy units that made a **fall‑back move** this phase and are within the **maximum distance**.

fluff.en: The foe’s advance is not something to be wary of but rather an opportunity to be seized.

target.en: One **HAEMONCULUS COVENS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

fluff.en: The twisted creations of the haemonculus covens are uncaring of all but the most mortal injuries.

target.en: One **KABAL** or **BLADES FOR HIRE** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets your Contract unit, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

fluff.en: Specially prepared for their chosen prey, these malignant poisons are the anathema of their targets.

target.en: One **ARCHON WARLORD** from your army.

when.en: Your Command phase, just after you complete a Contract (see Murderous Agenda Detachment rule).

effect.en: Select one new Contract from those listed in the Murderous Agenda Detachment rule (this can be one you have already completed), then select one unit from your opponent’s army that is on the battlefield and matches the ‘Contract’ description in that Contract. Until that Contract is completed, that unit is your Contract unit and the Murderous Agenda Detachment rule applies as normal.

fluff.en: This Archon’s personal kill list of rivals, nemeses and victims is virtually never‑ending.

target.en: One **HAEMONCULUS** model from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Any phase.

effect.en: Spend 1‑3 Pain tokens. At the end of the phase, set the destroyed model back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with a number of wounds remaining equal to the number of Pain tokens you just spent.

restrictions.en: You cannot use this Stratagem if you have 0 Pain tokens, and you cannot target the same **HAEMONCULUS** model with this Stratagem more than once per battle.

fluff.en: To the greatest Haemonculi, death is but an intriguing and temporary state to be experienced.

target.en: That **DRUKHARI** unit.

when.en: Fight phase, just after a **DRUKHARI** unit from your army destroys an enemy unit.

effect.en: Each enemy unit within 9" of and visible to your unit must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if your unit is a **HAEMONCULUS COVENS** unit.

fluff.en: So extreme are the foe’s agonies that they spread a shock wave of terror through their comrades.

target.en: That **HAEMONCULUS COVENS** unit.

when.en: Fight phase, just after a **HAEMONCULUS COVENS** unit from your army has fought.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit (excluding **VEHICLES**) hit by one or more of your unit’s attacks this phase. Until the end of the battle, that enemy unit is poisoned. At the start of each Command phase, roll one D6 for each poisoned unit on the battlefield: on a 4+, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

fluff.en: The venoms wielded by these warriors are potent enough to impress Shaimesh himself.

target.en: That **DRUKHARI** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after a **DRUKHARI** unit from your army Falls Back.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in turn in which it Fell Back.

fluff.en: Employing a common ruse from the arenas, the Drukhari appear to cower, wounded and exhausted, before surging back at their overconfident opponents with blades and fangs bared.

target.en: One **WYCH CULT** unit from your army.

when.en: Start of your Movement or Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, you can ignore any or all modifiers to its Move characteristic and to Advance and Charge rolls made for it and, until the end of the turn, each time a model in your unit makes such a move, it can move horizontally through models (when doing so, such a model can move within Engagement Range of such models but cannot end a Normal or Advance move within Engagement Range of them).

fluff.en: Bounding and weaving, the Wyches cross the battlefield with unmatched acrobatic agility.

target.en: One **KABAL** or **BLADES FOR HIRE** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks, and one friendly **DRUKHARI** unit (excluding **VEHICLES**).

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time you would allocate an attack to a model in your **KABAL** or **BLADES FOR HIRE** unit, if your **DRUKHARI** unit is within Engagement Range of the attacking model, no saving throw is made for that attack; instead, your **DRUKHARI** unit suffers a number of mortal wounds equal to the Damage characteristic of that attack.

fluff.en: What better way to eliminate rivals than tricking them into taking the blade meant for your ribs?

target.en: One **KABAL** or **BLADES FOR HIRE** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

fluff.en: A life lived amidst the shadowed spires of Commorragh teaches many ways to creep up on your enemies, unseen and unsuspected.

target.en: That **TRANSPORT**.

when.en: Fight phase, just after a **DRUKHARI TRANSPORT** from your army has selected its targets.

effect.en: After your **TRANSPORT** has fought, select one enemy unit that was the target of one or more of those attacks and roll one D6 for each model embarked within your **TRANSPORT**, adding 1 to the result if that embarked model is a **WRACKS** model: for each 5+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

fluff.en: Wielding a horrifying array of hooked boarding blades, barbed lariats and other specialised tools of agony, these warriors hack and slash at their foes even as their transport skims low overhead.

target.en: One **DRUKHARI INFANTRY** unit from your army that fought this phase.

when.en: End of the Fight phase.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal or Fall Back move, but unless it is a **WYCHES** unit, it must end that move wholly within 3" horizontally and 5" vertically of a friendly **DRUKHARI TRANSPORT** and must embark within that **TRANSPORT** at the end of that move (otherwise, it cannot make that move). Your unit can embark within that **TRANSPORT** in a turn it disembarked from that **TRANSPORT**.

fluff.en: Employing smoke grenades, paralysing mists or simple cunning and agility, these warriors slip away like spectres.

target.en: That **INFANTRY** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after a **DRUKHARI INFANTRY** unit from your army disembarks from a **TRANSPORT** that made a Normal move this phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge.

fluff.en: Incredible alien agility and a delight in taking wild risks help these warriors to leap acrobatically from their skimming transports directly into battle.

target.en: One **DRUKHARI TRANSPORT** from your army that is within 8" of that enemy unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Your **TRANSPORT** can make a Normal move of up to 6".

fluff.en: The crew of this skimmer delight in evading and taunting their enemies with mocking ease.

target.en: That unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after a **DRUKHARI** or **HARLEQUINS** unit from your army has Advanced.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

fluff.en: Having selected their victims, these killers strive to complete the kill with speed and brutality whilst moving ever closer to winning their macabre wager.

target.en: That unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase, just after a **DRUKHARI** or **HARLEQUINS** unit from your army is selected to make a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, is set up on the battlefield, or declares a charge.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at your unit.

fluff.en: Commorrite or Harlequin, these lithe combatants move with stunning speed, darting in and out of firing lines before their foes can raise their weapons.

target.en: One **DRUKHARI** or **HARLEQUINS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if that unit is losing the wager: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. That destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: These warriors are so absorbed by their desire to win the wager that they risk death to land their killing blows.

target.en: Up to two **WRACKS** units from your army, or one other **DRUKHARI** unit from your army.

when.en: Start of the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in each of those units have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

fluff.en: Wicked sickles and serrated blades hack through writhing flesh as the Drukhari harvest agony and suffering.

target.en: One **HAEMONCULUS COVENS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

effect.en: Your unit can make a **surge move** of up to D6".

fluff.en: Even as the prey seek to drive the covenites back with hails of firepower, the horrors lurch closer.

target.en: One **WYCH CULT** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: The cult’s gladiators enter a killing trance when combat is joined, allowing them to fight on through the most grievous hurts with undimmed ferocity.

target.en: One **DRUKHARI INFANTRY** or **HARLEQUINS INFANTRY** unit from your army that is within 8" of that enemy unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6". If your unit is currently losing the wager, it can make a Normal move of up to 6" instead.

fluff.en: The saedath’s victims become unwitting partners in a frantic dance of ghastly slaughter.

target.en: Up to two **KABALITE WARRIORS** units from your army, or one other **DRUKHARI** unit from your army (excluding **SCOURGES** and **AIRCRAFT**).

when.en: End of your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Each of those units can make a Normal move of up to 6".

restrictions.en: You cannot select units that are within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. Until the end of the turn, those units are not eligible to declare a charge.

fluff.en: The Drukhari are masters at using hit‑and‑run tactics, engaging a target with a flurry of shots before quickly manoeuvring into cover or out of sight.

target.en: One **HAEMONCULUS COVENS** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is Battle‑shocked, that attack has the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

fluff.en: By arcane syringe and unholy invocation, the enemy’s terror is syphoned out of their bodies, leaving them as little more than contorted husks.

target.en: One **DRUKHARI VEHICLE** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

fluff.en: These powerful Drukhari devices occlude their raiding vehicles from physical sight, targeting sensors, and even psychic senses.

target.en: That <k>Blades for Hire/Kabal</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>雇われ刺客/陰謀団</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>雇佣之刃/阴谋团</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly <k>Blades for Hire/Kabal</k> unit has shot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine <k>Gedungene</k>-<k>Mörder</k>-<k>/Kabale</k>-Einheit geschossen hat
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad <k>Espadas de alquiler/Kábala</k> amiga haya disparado.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de <k>Lames à Louer/Kabale</k> amie a tiré.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità di <k>Lame al Soldo/Cabala</k> ha tirato.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方<k>雇われ刺客/陰謀団</k>・ユニットが射撃を行った時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 <k>칼날 용병단/카발</k> 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 在己方射击阶段中，当一个己方<k>雇佣之刃/阴谋团</k>单位完成射击后。

effect.en: Those attacks do not prevent your unit from being hidden.
effect.de: Jene Attacken verhindern nicht, dass deine Einheit versteckt ist.
effect.es: Esos ataques no impiden que tu unidad esté oculta.
effect.fr: Ces attaques n’empêchent pas votre unité d’être cachée.
effect.it: Quegli attacchi non impediscono alla tua unità di essere nascosta.
effect.ja: それらの攻撃は、その自軍ユニットの隠密状態を解除しない。
effect.ko: 그 공격에도 불구하고 이 유닛은 은폐 상태를 유지합니다.
effect.zh: 那些攻击不会阻止您的单位隐藏。

fluff.en: The capability of militant kabals to project their killing power is rightfully feared, as is the fact that the perpetrators can usually never be found.
fluff.de: Die Fähigkeit militanter Kabalen, ihre mörderische Feuerkraft über weite Strecken ins Ziel zu bringen, ist ebenso weitläufig gefürchtet wie die Tatsache, dass die Schützen selten ausfindig gemacht werden können.
fluff.es: La capacidad de las kábalas militantes para proyectar su poder asesino es, con razón, temida, al igual que el hecho de que los perpetradores, por lo general, nunca sean encontrados.
fluff.fr: La capacité des kabales militantes à assassiner est crainte à juste titre, comme l'est le fait que leurs agents ne sont généralement jamais retrouvés.
fluff.it: La capacità delle cabale di proiettare il loro potere omicida è giustamente temuta, tanto quanto il fatto che gli aguzzini siano soliti svanire nel nulla.
fluff.ja: 陰謀団の軍事組織がその殺傷力を遠隔にまで投射する力は、広く恐れられている。そして同様に恐るべきは、その実行者がほぼ見つかることがないという事実である。
fluff.ko: 군사 카발이 대상을 살해하는 능력은 가공할 수준이다. 게다가 그 살인범을 찾는 일조차 거의 불가능하다.
fluff.zh: 阴谋团的武装团体所拥有的杀戮能力理所当然的令人恐惧，尤其是因为通常都无法被发现。

target.en: That <k>Blades for Hire/Kabal</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>雇われ刺客/陰謀団</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>雇佣之刃/阴谋团</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when a friendly <k>Blades for Hire/Kabal</k> unit targets a <k>Character</k> unit.
when.de: In deiner Fernkampfphase oder in der Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete <k>Gedungene</k>-<k>Mörder</k>-<k>/Kabale</k>-Einheit eine <k>Charaktermodell</k>-Einheit als Ziel wählt
when.es: En tu fase de disparo o en la fase de combate, cuando una unidad <k>Espadas de alquiler/Kábala</k> amiga tome como blanco una unidad <k>Personaje</k>.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir ou à la phase de Combat, quand une unité de <k>Lames à Louer/Kabale</k> amie cible une unité de <k>Personnage</k>.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro o nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità di <k>Lame al Soldo/Cabala</k> amica ha come bersaglio un’unità <k>Personaggio</k>.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、あるいは任意の白兵フェイズ中、味方<k>雇われ刺客/陰謀団</k>・ユニットが<k>キャラクター</k>・ユニットを攻撃対象として選択した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈 또는 백병전 페이즈, 아군 <k>칼날 용병단/카발</k> 유닛이 <k>캐릭터</k> 유닛을 대상으로 지정할 때.
when.zh: 您的射击阶段或在近战阶段中，在一个己方<k>雇佣之刃/阴谋团</k>单位将一个<k>角色</k> 单位选为目标时。

effect.en:
Your unit’s attacks that target a Character unit can:
  • Re‑roll hit rolls of 1.
  • Re‑roll wound rolls of 1.
effect.de:
Für Attacken deiner Einheit gegen eine Charaktermodell-Einheit können:
  • Trefferwürfe von 1 wiederholt werden.
  • Verwundungswürfe von 1 wiederholt werden.
effect.es:
En los ataques de tu unidad que tomen como blanco un Personaje, puedes:
  • Repetir las tiradas para impactar de 1.
  • Repetir las tiradas para herir de 1.
effect.fr:
Les attaques de votre unité qui ciblent une unité de Personnage peuvent :
  • Relancer les jets de touche de 1.
  • Relancer les jets de blessure de 1.
effect.it:
Gli attacchi della tua unità che hanno come bersaglio un’unità Personaggio possono:
  • Ripetere i tiri per colpire pari a 1.
  • Ripetere i tiri per ferire pari a 1.
effect.ja:
その自軍ユニットの攻撃がキャラクター・ユニットを対象とする場合：
  • ヒットロールの出目1をリロールする。
  • ウーンズロールの出目1をリロールする。
effect.ko:
캐릭터 유닛을 대상으로 지정하는 이 유닛의 공격에 다음을 적용합니다.
  • 값이 1인 명중 굴림을 재굴림합니다.
  • 값이 1인 타격 굴림을 재굴림합니다.
effect.zh:
您的单位针对一个角色单位进行的攻击可以：
  • 重掷结果为 1 的命中掷骰。
  • 重掷结果为 1 的致伤掷骰。

fluff.en: Contracts to annihilate, maim or capture singular victims of rarefied value are eagerly competed for by a kabal’s killers.
fluff.de: Die Killer der Kabale wetteifern voller Mordlust darum, Kopfgelder zu erhaschen, die auf Vernichtung, Pein und Gefangenschaft exklusiver Opfer ausgestellt sind.
fluff.es: Los contratos para aniquilar, mutilar o capturar víctimas singulares de valor excepcional son anhelados con vehemencia por los asesinos de una Kábala.
fluff.fr: Les contrats pour occire, mutiler ou capturer des victimes rares et de valeur sont avidement remplis par les tueurs d'une kabale.
fluff.it: I contratti stipulati per uccidere, menomare o catturare individui di particolare spicco sono molto ambiti dagli assassini delle cabale.
fluff.ja: 希少価値のある標的の殲滅や拘束に関する契約は、陰謀団の暗殺者たちにとって垂涎の的であり、熾烈な争奪の対象となる。
fluff.ko: 카발의 살인자들은 희귀한 희생양을 섬멸하고, 해치고, 납치하는 계약을 두고 서로 경쟁한다.
fluff.zh: 针对那些身价非凡、独一无二的受害者——旨在将其歼灭、致残或生擒——的契约，总是引得阴谋团的杀手们竞相争夺。

target.en: That <k>Kabalite Warriors</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>カバライト・ウォリアー</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Kabalite Warriors unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Kabalen­krieger-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Guerreros Kabalistas amiga se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de Guerriers Kabalites amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità di Guerrieri Cabaliti amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方カバライト・ウォリアー・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 카발 전사 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方阴谋团战士单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en: Your unit’s ranged attacks have <k>[Ignores Cover]</k>.
effect.es: Los ataques a distancia de tu unidad tienen <k>[Ignora cobertura]</k>.
effect.fr: Les attaques de tir de votre unité ont <k>[Ignore le Couvert]</k>.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da tiro della tua unità hanno <k>[Ignora la Copertura]</k>.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの射撃攻撃は<k>［遮蔽無効］</k>を持つ。
effect.ko: 이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 <k>[엄폐 무시]</k>를 부여합니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位的远程攻击拥有<k>[无视掩体]</k>。

fluff.en: Defensive barriers or camouflage are little protection against those who have honed their talents hunting amongst the twisted and dark spires of their kabal’s territory.
fluff.de: Defensive Barrieren oder Tarnmuster bieten wenig Schutz gegenüber solchen Kriegern, die ihre Jagdbegabung in den dunklen und verdorbenen Türmen des Territoriums der Kabale erlangt haben.
fluff.es: Las barreras defensivas o el camuflaje son poca protección contra quienes han perfeccionado sus habilidades cazando entre las retorcidas y oscuras torres del territorio de su kábala.
fluff.fr: Les boucliers et le camouflage n'offrent guère de protection contre ceux qui ont affûté leurs talents en chassant parmi les flèches crépusculaires du territoire de leur kabale.
fluff.it: Barriere difensive o camuffamenti servono a poco contro chi ha affinato le proprie capacità cacciando tra le guglie più pericolose e oscure del territorio della cabala.
fluff.ja: 陰謀団の領地に立ち並ぶ、捻れた暗き尖塔の間で腕を鍛えた殺し屋たちにとっては、防壁や偽装などほぼ何の意味もない抵抗だ。
fluff.ko: 방어 장벽이나 위장 따위는 카발의 영역 내 암흑 첨탑에서 사냥하며 재주를 연마한 살인자에게 아무런 방해가 되지 않는다.
fluff.zh: 对于时常在阴谋团领地中狩猎的杀手来说，没有任何防御障碍或迷彩手段能够阻碍他们。

target.en: That <k>Coven of Agonies Wracks</k> unit.
target.es: Esa unidad <k>Atormentados Cónclave de la Agonía</k>.
target.fr: Cette unité de <k>Gorgones</k> de <k>Coterie de l’Affliction</k>.
target.it: Quell’unità di <k>Carcasse della Congrega delle Torture</k>.
target.ja: その<k>苦悶の盟約団・ラック</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>折磨巫会凌虐者</k>单位。

when.en: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly <k>Coven of Agonies Wracks</k> unit.
when.de: Die Fernkampfphase deines Gegners oder die Nahkampfphase, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine befreundete <k>Zirkel-der-Qualen-Folterer</k>-Einheit als Ziel wählt
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente o en la fase de combate, cuando una unidad enemiga tome como blanco una unidad <k>Atormentados Cónclave de la Agonía</k> amiga.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse ou à la phase de Combat, quand une unité ennemie cible une unité de <k>Gorgones</k> de <k>Coterie de l’Affliction</k> amie.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario o nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità nemica sceglie come bersaglio un’unità di <k>Carcasse della Congrega delle Torture</k> amica.
when.ja: 敵軍射撃フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方<k>苦悶の盟約団・ラック</k>・ユニットを攻撃対象にした時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈 또는 백병전 페이즈, 적 유닛이 아군 <k>고통의 코븐 고문기계병</k> 유닛을 대상으로 지정했을 때.
when.zh: 在您对手的射击阶段中或在近战阶段中，当一个敌方单位对一个己方<k>折磨巫会凌虐者</k>单位进行攻击时。

effect.en: Attacks that target your unit have -1 to wound rolls.
effect.de: Attacken gegen deine Einheit haben -1 auf Verwundungswürfe.
effect.es: Los ataques que tomen como blanco tu unidad tienen -1 a las tiradas para herir.
effect.fr: Les attaques qui ciblent votre unité ont -1 aux jets de blessure.
effect.it: Gli attacchi che hanno come bersaglio la tua unità hanno -1 ai tiri per ferire.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットを対象とする攻撃はウーンズロールに-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 이 유닛을 대상으로 지정한 공격에 타격 굴림 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 针对您的单位进行的攻击的致伤掷骰 -1。

fluff.en: Nuul’s Exquisite fleshcraft and alchemical tinkering have provided his Wracks with formidable, hardened skin, quite capable of absorbing bullets and deflecting blades.
fluff.de: Nuuls außerordentliche Fleischformung und seine alchemistischen Experimente haben seinen Folterern stabile Schorfhaut eingebracht, von der Geschosse abprallen und Klingen abgleiten.
fluff.es: La exquisita artesanía de la carne y la alquimia de Nuul han dotado a sus Atormentados de una piel formidable y endurecida, capaz de absorber balas y desviar espadas.
fluff.fr: L’art charnel et alchimique sublimé de Nuul a nanti ses Gorgones d’un cuir si solide qu’il peut arrêter les balles et se jouer des lames.
fluff.it: L’abile manipolazione della carne e le sperimentazioni alchemiche di Nuul hanno dato vita a Carcasse dalla pelle estremamente dura, tanto da assorbire proiettili e deviare le lame.
fluff.ja: ヌールの精妙なる肉体加工と錬金的改変により、ラックは強靭に硬化した皮膚を備える。それは弾丸を受け止め、刃をはじき返すことができる。
fluff.ko: 이 고문기계병의 피부는 눌의 정교한 살점술과 연금술 덕에 놀랍도록 강화되었으며, 총탄을 받아내고 칼날마저 튕겨낼 수 있다.
fluff.zh: 努尔的精湛技艺和改造技术让手下的凌虐者得到了坚硬的外皮，能够吸收枪弹的伤害或弹开剑刃。

target.en: That <k>Coven of Agonies Monster</k> unit.
target.es: Esa unidad <k>Monstruo Cónclave de la Agonía</k>.
target.fr: Cette unité de <k>Monstre</k> de <k>Coterie de l’Affliction</k>.
target.ja: その<k>苦悶の盟約団・モンスター</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Fight phase, when a friendly Coven of Agonies Monster unit is selected to fight.
when.de: Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundeteZirkel-der-Qualen-Monster-Einheit zum Kämpfen gewählt wird
when.es: En la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Monstruo Cónclave de la Agonía amiga se elija para combatir.
when.fr: À la phase de Combat, quand une unité de Monstre de Coterie de l’Affliction amie est choisie pour combattre.
when.it: Nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità Mostro della Congrega delle Torture amica viene scelta per combattere.
when.ja: 白兵フェイズ中、味方苦悶の盟約団・モンスター・ユニットが白兵を宣言した時。
when.ko: 백병전 페이즈, 아군 고통의 코븐 유닛이 백병전 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在近战阶段中，当一个己方折磨巫会凶兽单位被选择进行近战时。

effect.en:
Your unit's attacks that target a Monster/Vehicle unit have:
  • +1 to wound rolls.
  • +1 AP.
effect.de:
Attacken deiner Einheit gegen eine Monster-/Fahrzeug-Einheit haben:
  • +1 auf Verwundungswürfe.
  • +1 DS.
effect.es:
Los ataques de tu unidad que tomen como blanco una unidad Monstruo/Vehículo tienen:
  • +1 a las tiradas para herir.
  • +1 a FP.
effect.fr:
Les attaques de votre unité qui ciblent une unité de Monstre/Véhicule ont :
  • +1 aux jets de blessure.
  • +1 en PA.
effect.it:
Gli attacchi della tua unità che hanno come bersaglio un’unità Mostro/Veicolo hanno:
  • +1 ai tiri per ferire.
  • +1 VP.
effect.ja:
その自軍ユニットの攻撃がモンスター/ビークル・ユニットを対象としている場合：
  • ウーンズロールに+1の修正を受ける。
  • 【貫】に+1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko:
이 유닛의 공격이 괴수/기체 유닛을 대상으로 지정하면, 다음을 적용합니다.
  • 타격 굴림 +1
  • 관통 +1
effect.zh:
您的单位对一个凶兽/载具单位进行的攻击拥有：
  • +1 命中掷骰。
  • +1 AP。

fluff.en: Drawing upon the alchemical might of the dark sciences that fashioned it, this Pain Engine rampages across the battlefield with nightmarish vitality.
fluff.de: Diese Schmerzmaschine zehrt von der alchemistischen Macht, durch die sie erschaffen wurde, und tobt mit albtraumhafter Lebendigkeit über das Schlachteld.
fluff.es: Aprovechando el poder alquímico de las ciencias oscuras que lo crearon, este Artefacto del Dolor arrasa el campo de batalla con una vitalidad de pesadilla.
fluff.fr: Mue par la puissance alchimique de la science obscure qui l’a engendrée, cette Machine de Tourment commet des tueries avec une vitalité cauchemardesque.
fluff.it: Grazie ai potenti composti alchemici usati per crearla, frutto di scienze oscure, questa Macchina del Dolore irrompe sul campo con raccapricciante veemenza.
fluff.ja: このペイン・エンジンを形成する禍々しき錬金科学の力を用いて、悪夢のごとき力で戦場を蹂躙させる。
fluff.ko: 자신을 만들어 낸 사악한 과학으로부터 연금술적 힘을 끌어낸 이 고통 기계는 악몽 같은 생명령을 과시하며 전장을 휘젓는다.
fluff.zh: 汲取了缔造自身的黑暗科学之力，这台痛苦引擎正以梦魇般的生命力，在战场之上横冲直撞。

target.en: That <k>Coven of Agonies</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>苦悶の盟約団</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when a friendly Coven of Agonies unit is selected to attack.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase oder die Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Zirkel-der-Qualen-Einheit zum Attackieren gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo o en la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Cónclave de la Agonía amiga se elija para atacar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir ou à la phase de Combat, quand une unité de Coterie de l’Affliction amie est choisie pour attaquer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro o nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità della Congrega delle Torture amica viene scelta per attaccare.
when.ja: 自軍射撃フェイズ中、あるいは任意の白兵フェイズ中、味方苦悶の盟約団・ユニットが攻撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈 또는 백병전 페이즈, 아군 고통의 코븐 유닛이 공격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段或在近战阶段中，当一个己方折磨巫会单位被选择进行攻击时。

effect.en:
Your unit's attacks:
  • Can re-roll hit rolls of 1.
  • Or: If you spend 1 Pain token, can re-roll hit rolls.
effect.de:
Für die Attacken deiner Einheit:
  • können Trefferwürfe von 1 wiederholt werden.
  • Oder: Trefferwürfe wiederholt werden, wenn du 1 Schmerzmarker ausgibst.
effect.es:
En los ataques de tu unidad:
  • Puedes repetir las tiradas para impactar de 1.
  • O: Si gastas 1 ficha de dolor, puedes repetir cualquier tirada para impactar.
effect.fr:
Les attaques de votre unité :
  • Peuvent relancer les jets de touche de 1.
  • Ou : Si vous dépensez 1 pion de Souffrance, elles peuvent relancer les jets de touche.
effect.it:
Gli attacchi della tua unità:
  • Possono ripetere i tiri per colpire pari a 1.
  • Oppure: Se spendi 1 indicatore Dolore, possono ripetere i tiri per colpire.
effect.ja:
自軍ユニットの攻撃：
    ヒットロールの出目1をリロールできる。
  • または： 自軍は苦痛トークンを1個消費して、ヒットロールをリロールできる。
effect.ko:
이 유닛의 공격에 다음을 적용합니다.
  • 값이 1인 명중 굴림을 재굴림할 수 있습니다.
  • 또는, 고통 토큰 1개를 소모하면, 명중 굴림을 재굴림할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh:
您的单位的攻击：
  • 可以重掷结果为 1 的命中掷骰。
  • 或者：如果您花费了 1 枚痛苦标识，则可以重掷命中掷骰。

fluff.en: Driven to inflict maximum agony upon their targets, Nuul’s menagerie unleashes relentless fusillades or flurries of savage blows, channelling harvested pain to empower their efforts.
fluff.de: Nuuls Menagerie verlangt es danach, ihren Zielen größtmögliches Leid zuzufügen, weshalb sie erbarmungslose Salven oder Hiebe entfesselt und bereits geernteten Schmerz kanalisiert, um ihre Angriffe noch zu stärken.
fluff.es: Impulsados ​​por infligir la máxima agonía a sus objetivos, la gente de Nuul desata andanadas implacables o ráfagas de golpes salvajes, canalizando el dolor acumulado para potenciarse.
fluff.fr: Poussée à infliger un maximum de souffrances à ses cibles, la ménagerie de Nuul recourt à des fusillades soutenues ou à des grêles de coups furieux, en redoublant d’efforts grâce à la douleur récoltée.
fluff.it: Costrette a infliggere sofferenze inenarrabili ai nemici, le cavie di Nuul esplodono raffiche serrate o sferrano attacchi feroci, sfruttando il dolore per intensificare la propria forza.
fluff.ja: 標的に最大の苦痛を与えるべく駆り立てられたヌールの獣群は、容赦なき連射または苛烈な連撃を加える。収穫した苦痛は力へと転じられ、その攻勢をさらに増幅する。
fluff.ko: 눌의 야수들은 목표물에게 최대한의 고통을 가하기 위해 안달이 나 있다. 이들은 가차없는 일제사격과 무자비한 난도질에서 거둔 고통으로 자기 힘을 더욱 증강한다.
fluff.zh: 为了向目标施加极度的痛苦，努尔的手下会倾泻出连绵不绝的弹幕或狂风骤雨般的凶猛重击，并将汲取的痛苦转化为力量，以此强化自身的攻势。

target.en: That <k>Haemonculus Covens</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ハモンキュラスの盟約団</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Haemonculus Covens unit is selected to make a fall‑back move.
when.de: Deine Bewegungsphase, wenn eine befreundete Haemonculus-Zirkel-Einheit gewählt wird, eine Rückzugsbewegung auszuführen
when.es: En tu fase de movimiento, cuando una unidad Cónclaves Hemónculos amiga se elige para hacer un movimiento de retroceder.
when.fr: À votre phase de Mouvement, quand une unité de Coterie d’Hémoncules amie est choisie pour faire un mouvement de retraite.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Movimento, quando un’unità delle Congreghe degli Haemonculi amica viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di ripiegamento.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ中、味方ハモンキュラスの盟約団・ユニットが退却移動を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 이동 페이즈, 아군 하에몬쿨루스 코븐 유닛이 후퇴 이동을 수행하기 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 己方移动阶段中，在一个己方血伶人巫会单位被选择进行一次后撤移动时。

effect.en: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to declare a charge.
effect.de: Jene Bewegung verhindert nicht, dass deine Einheit infrage kommt, einen Angriff anzusagen.
effect.es: Ese movimiento no le impide a tu unidad ser apta para declarar cargas.
effect.fr: Ce mouvement n’empêche pas votre unité d’être éligible pour déclarer une charge.
effect.it: Quel movimento non impedisce alla tua unità di essere idonea a dichiarare una carica.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは突撃を宣言可能である。
effect.ko: 그 이동에도 불구하고 그 아군 유닛은 돌격 선언이 가능합니다.
effect.zh: 那次移动不会阻止您的单位宣布冲锋。

fluff.en: The unhurried menace exuded by Covenites as they extricate themselves from gore‑slick foes can metamorphose in an instant back to pain‑hungry savagery.
fluff.de: Die bedrohliche Langsamkeit, mit der sich die Zirkelmitglieder von blutbespritzten Feindkadavern lösen, kann augenblicklich in schmerzlüsterne Tobsucht umschlagen.
fluff.es: La amenaza pausada que exudan los Cónclaves al liberarse de enemigos cubiertos de sangre puede transformarse instantáneamente en una ferocidad sedienta de dolor.
fluff.fr: La menace tranquille qui émane des membres des Coteries d’Hémoncules tandis qu’ils s’extirpent d’ennemis ensanglantés peut muer en un instant en sauvagerie assoiffée de souffrance.
fluff.it: In mezzo ai nemici insanguinati i congregari ostentano una calma carica di minaccia, che in un attimo si tramuta in furiosa brama di dolore.
fluff.ja: 盟約団員が血肉に塗れた敵から離れた時に見せる緩慢な脅威は、すぐさま苦痛に飢えた野蛮な脅威へと変貌する。
fluff.ko: 코븐의 드루카리가 피칠갑이 된 적으로부터 거리를 벌리면서 흘리는 느긋한 위협감은, 단 한순간에 고통에 목마른 야만성으로 탈바꿈할 수 있다.
fluff.zh: 巫会成员在远离敌人时所展现出的冷静可以在瞬间转变为对痛苦的狂野渴望。

target.en: That <k>CRONOS/TALOS</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ペインエンジン</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Fight phase, when a friendly CRONOS/TALOS unit is selected to fight.
when.de: Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Schmerzmaschine-Einheit zum Kämpfen gewählt wird
when.es: En la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Artefacto del Dolor amiga se elige para combatir.
when.fr: À la phase de Combat, quand une unité de Machine de Tourment amie est choisie pour combattre.
when.it: Nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità Macchina del Dolore amica viene scelta per combattere.
when.ja: 白兵フェイズ中、味方<k>ペインエンジン</k>・ユニットが白兵を宣言した時。
when.ko: 백병전 페이즈, 아군 고통 기계 유닛이 백병전 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在近战阶段中，当一个己方痛苦机械单位被选择进行近战时。

effect.en: Your unit’s attacks that target a battle‑shocked unit have [Devastating Wounds].
effect.de: Attacken deiner Einheit gegen eine erschütterte Einheit haben [Verheerende Verwundungen].
effect.es: Los ataques de tu unidad que tomen como blanco una unidad acobardada tienen [Heridas devastadoras].
effect.fr: Les attaques de votre unité qui ciblent une unité ébranlée ont [Blessures Dévastatrices].
effect.it: Gli attacchi della tua unità che hanno come bersaglio un’unità traumatizzata hanno [Ferite Devastanti].
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの攻撃が戦闘ショック状態のユニットを攻撃対象としていた場合、［会心ウーンズ］を持つ。
effect.ko: 전투충격 상태의 유닛을 대상으로 한 이 유닛의 공격에 [궤멸적 피해]를 부여합니다.
effect.zh: 在您的单位对一个处于战斗震慑状态的单位进行攻击时，攻击拥有[毁灭伤害]。

fluff.en: Confusion, terror, and panic are triggers for a Haemonculus’ Engines of Pain, which stimulate them to drive their evil augmentations even deeper into the foe.
fluff.de: Verwirrung, Angst und Panik sind Auslöser für die Schmerzmaschinen der Haemonculi, die sie stimulieren, ihre boshaften Gerätschaften noch tiefer in den Feind zu treiben.
fluff.es: La confusión, el terror y el pánico son los activadores de los Artefactos del Dolor de un Hemónculo, y los estimulan a clavar aún más sus biónicos malignos en el enemigo.
fluff.fr: La confusion, la terreur et la panique sont les déclencheurs pour les Machines de Tourment d’un Hémoncule, qui les stimule afin de plonger leur conception cruelle au cœur de l’ennemi.
fluff.it: Confusione, terrore e panico sono come benzina sul fuoco per le Macchine del Dolore degli Haemonculi, che si scatenano sempre più tra i ranghi nemici.
fluff.ja: 混乱や恐怖、そして恐慌状態はハモンキュラスのペインエンジンを稼働させる力となる。これらの苦痛の兵器は、邪悪な強化器官を敵の奥深くに突き立て、更なる恐怖を刺激するのだ。
fluff.ko: 혼란, 공포, 공황은 하에몬쿨루스가 창조한 고통의 기계 내에서 특정 반응을 일으킨다. 이로 인해 자극된 고통의 기계는 사악한 강화물을 적에게 더 깊이 박아넣기 위해 달려든다.
fluff.zh: 迷惑、恐惧与惊慌能够激活血伶人的痛苦机械，使这些邪恶的造物更加凶残。

target.en: That <k>Haemonculus Covens</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ハモンキュラスの盟約団</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Fight phase, when a friendly Haemonculus Covens unit destroys an enemy unit.
when.de: Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Haemonculus-Zirkel-Einheit eine feindliche Einheit zerstört
when.es: En la fase de combate cuando una unidad Cónclaves Hemónculos amiga elimina una unidad enemiga.
when.fr: À la phase de Combat, quand une unité de Coterie d’Hémoncules amie détruit une unité ennemie.
when.it: Nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità delle Congreghe degli Haemonculi amica distrugge un’unità nemica.
when.ja: 白兵フェイズ中、味方ハモンキュラスの盟約団・ユニットが敵ユニットを撃破した時。
when.ko: 백병전 페이즈, 아군 하에몬쿨루스 코븐 유닛이 적 유닛을 파괴할 때.
when.zh: 近战阶段中，在一个己方血伶人巫会单位摧毁一个敌方单位后。

effect.en: Select one visible enemy unit within 12" of your unit. That enemy unit makes a battle‑shock roll, with -1 to that battle‑shock roll.
effect.de: Wähle eine für deine Einheit sichtbare feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 12". Jene feindliche Einheit führt einen Erschütterungswurf mit -1 aus.
effect.es: Elige 1 unidad enemiga visible para tu unidad y a 12" o menos de ella. Esa unidad enemiga hace una tirada de acobardamiento con -1 a la tirada.
effect.fr: Choisissez une unité ennemie visible et à 12" ou moins de votre unité. L’unité ennemie choisie fait un jet d’ébranlement, avec -1 à ce jet.
effect.it: Scegli un’unità nemica visibile entro 12" dalla tua unità. Quell’unità nemica effettua un tiro per i traumi, con -1 a quel tiro per i traumi.
effect.ja: その自軍のユニットの12mv以内に一部でも入っており、視認可能である敵ユニット1個を選択する。選択された敵ユニットは戦闘ショックロールを行う。その戦闘ショックロールは-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 이 유닛의 시야에 들어오며 12" 내에 있는 적 유닛을 하나 지정합니다. 그 적 유닛은 전투충격 굴림을 수행합니다. 그 전투충격 굴림 값에 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个位于您的单位 12" 内且可见的敌方单位。那个敌方单位进行一次战斗震慑掷骰，并且那次战斗震慑掷骰 -1。

fluff.en: Sharing is typically anathema to the self‑centred Drukhari, except where horror can be fruitfully reinvested in those marked for later harvest.
fluff.de: Normalerweise ist Großzügigkeit den Drukhari ein Gräuel, es sei denn, sie können das Grauen mit jenen teilen, die sie als spätere Beute auserkoren haben.
fluff.es: Compartir suele ser un anatema para los egocéntricos Drukhari, excepto cuando el horror puede reinvertirse fructíferamente en aquellos marcados para una cosecha posterior.
fluff.fr: Les Drukhari abhorrent le partage, sauf quand l’horreur peut être avantageusement réinvestie chez ceux qui sont voués à une future rafle.
fluff.it: Gli egocentrici Drukhari solitamente detestano l’idea di condividere alcunché, tranne quando serve a mietere ancora più dolore e sofferenza nei bersagli futuri.
fluff.ja: 利己性に満ちたデュカーリにとって、何かを共有することは多くの場合、忌むべき行いだ。後に刈り取るための恐怖を刻み、実りある形で還元され得る場合は、その数少ない例外となる。
fluff.ko: 자기 중심적인 드루카리에게 있어 공유란 대체로 혐오스러운 것이지만, 나중에 거두어들일 희생물에 공포를 투자할 수 있는 짭짤한 기회가 있다면 예외라고 할 수 있다.
fluff.zh: 对于自私的黑暗灵族而言，分享是一个几乎不存在的概念，那些在之后可以被收割的恐惧则是例外。

target.en: That <k>Wych Cult</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>魔女団</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Fight phase, when a friendly Wych Cult unit is selected to fight.
when.de: Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete <k>Hekatarii-Kult</k>-Einheit zum Kämpfen gewählt wird
when.es: En la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Culto de Brujas amiga se elija para combatir.
when.fr: À la phase de Combat, quand une unité de Culte Céraste amie est choisie pour combattre
when.it: Nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità del Culto delle Erynni amica viene scelta per combattere.
when.ja: 白兵フェイズ中、味方魔女団・ユニットが白兵を宣言した時。
when.ko: 백병전 페이즈, 아군 마녀병 컬트 유닛이 백병전 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 近战阶段中，当一个己方巫灵教派单位被选择进行近战时。

effect.en: Your unit’s melee attacks have <k>[Lethal Hits]</k>.
effect.de: Die Nahkampfattacken deiner Einheit haben <k>[Tödliche Treffer]</k>.
effect.es: Los ataques de combate de tu unidad tienen <k>[Impactos letales]</k>.
effect.fr: Les attaques de mêlée de votre unité ont <k>[Touches Fatales]</k>.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da mischia della tua unità hanno <k>Colpi Letali</k>.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの白兵攻撃は<k>［会心ヒット］</k>を持つ。
effect.zh: 您的单位的近战攻击拥有<k>[致命一击]</k>。

fluff.en: Murderous rehearsals ensure that those who survive can bring down the most resilient of prey in puissant displays.
fluff.de: Tödliche Probeaufführungen tragen dafür Sorge, dass die Überlebenden die widerstandsfähigste Beute mit Leichtigkeit zu Fall bringen.
fluff.es: Ensayar los asesinatos garantiza que los supervivientes puedan abatir a las presas más resistentes en poderosas exhibiciones.
fluff.fr: Des répétitions meurtrières veillent à ce que ceux qui y survivent puissent faucher les proies les plus résistantes dans une démonstration de talent.
fluff.it: Le simulazioni di attacco fanno in modo che le gladiatrici superstiti possano abbattere le prede più resistenti con prova della loro forza.
fluff.ja: 凄惨なる演習を重ねることで、生還した者は圧倒的な威力を示し、いかに強靭な獲物をも討ち倒す力を得る。
fluff.ko: 피범벅의 리허설에서 살아남은 자는 가장 굳센 적을 화려하게 쓰러뜨릴 수 있다.
fluff.zh: 血腥的预演让那些存活下来的艺人能够以最浮夸的技巧杀死最坚韧的猎物。

target.en: That <k>Wych Cult</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>魔女団</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly <k>Wych Cult</k> unit.
when.de: Fernkampfphase deines Gegners, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine befreundete <k>Hekatarii-Kult</k>-Einheit als Ziel wählt
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga toma como blanco una unidad <k>Culto de Brujas</k> amiga.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse, quand une unité ennemie cible une unité de <k>Culte Céraste</k> amie.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario, quando un’unità nemica ha come bersaglio un’unità del <k>Culto delle Erynni</k> amica.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方<k>魔女団</k>・ユニットを攻撃対象にした時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈, 적 유닛이 아군 <k>마녀병 컬트</k> 유닛을 대상으로 지정할 때.
when.zh: 在您对手的射击阶段中，当一个敌方单位将一个己方<k>巫灵教派</k>单位选为目标时。

effect.en: Your unit has 5+ InSv.
effect.es: Tu unidad tiene una S Inv de 5+.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは【特防】5+を持つ。

fluff.en: Moving so quickly they seem to blur, the Wyches evade incoming fire with contemptuous elegance.
fluff.de: Die Hekatarii bewegen sich schnell wie Schemen und weichen Feindfeuer mit verächtlicher Leichtigkeit aus.
fluff.es: Las Brujas esquivan los disparos con desdeñosa elegancia y tanta rapidez que solo se ve un borrón.
fluff.fr: Se déplaçant si vite qu'on ne peut les suivre du regard, les Cérastes esquivent les tirs avec une élégance dédaigneuse.
fluff.it: Muovendosi come saette, le Erynni eludono il fuoco nemico con sprezzante eleganza
fluff.ja: ウィッチは目にもとまらぬほどの速さで動き、優雅に敵を侮蔑しながら、迫り来る砲火をも回避してしまう。
fluff.ko: 마녀병이 잔상을 남길 기세로 빠르게 움직이며 경멸적인 우아함으로 포화를 피한다.
fluff.zh: 这些巫灵的动作迅速到自身变得模糊不清，以优雅和蔑视回避敌人的攻击。

target.en: That <k>Wych Cult</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>魔女団</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Wych Cult unit is selected to make an advance/fall-back move.
when.de: Deine Bewegungsphase, wenn eine befreundete Hekatarii-Kult-Einheit gewählt wird, eine Vorrücken-/Rückzugsbewegung auszuführen
when.es: En tu fase de movimiento, cuando una unidad Culto de Brujas amiga hace un movimiento de avanzar/de retroceder.
when.fr: À votre phase de Mouvement, quand une unité de Culte Céraste amie est choisie pour faire un mouvement d’avance/de retraite.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Movimento, quando un’unità del Culto delle Erynni amica viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di avanzata/ripiegamento.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ中、味方魔女団・ユニットが全力移動/退却移動を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 이동 페이즈, 아군 마녀병 컬트 유닛이 급속/후퇴 이동 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的移动阶段中，当一个己方巫灵教派单位被选择进行一次突进/后撤移动时。

effect.en: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to start an action.
effect.de: Jene Bewegung verhindert nicht, dass deine Einheit infrage kommt, eine Aktion zu beginnen.
effect.es: Ese movimiento no impide a tu unidad ser apta para iniciar acciones.
effect.fr: Ce mouvement n’empêche pas votre unité d’être éligible pour entreprendre une action.
effect.it: Quel movimento non impedisce alla tua unità di essere idonea a iniziare un’azione.
effect.ja: その移動を行った自軍ユニットはアクションの開始を宣言できる。
effect.ko: 아군 유닛은 그 이동 수행에도 불구하고 특수 행동을 시작할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 那次移动不会阻止您的单位开始一次行动。

fluff.en: Gauche are the gladiators who kill too relentlessly. Preparing the stage with a variety of torments in order to build the tension for a delightful crescendo is the mark of a true artist.
fluff.de: Gladiatorinnen, die zu schnell töten, gelten als stümperhaft. Es sollte zuvor die Bühne mit allerlei Qual bereitet werden, um die Spannung zu einem würdevollen Höhepunkt zu treiben, der eine wahre Künstlerin ausmacht.
fluff.es: Quienes matan con demasiada implacabilidad son unos torpes. Preparar el escenario con diversos tormentos y crear la tensión necesaria para un crescendo delicioso es la marca del verdadero artista.
fluff.fr: Gauches sont les gladiateurs qui tuent avec trop d'empressement. Préparer la scène avec une variété de tourments en faisant monter la tension dans un crescendo délectable, voilà la marque d'un véritable artiste.
fluff.it: I gladiatori che uccidono senza sosta risultano rozzi. Preparare la scena con una serie di tormenti per far aumentare la tensione in un delizioso crescendo è tipico dei veri artisti.
fluff.ja: 殺戮に急ぎすぎる剣闘士は洗練を欠く。多彩な拷問によって舞台を整え、やがて訪れる愉悦の絶頂へと昂揚を積み上げることこそ、真なる芸術家の流儀であろう。
fluff.ko:
대상을 너무 가차없이 참살하는 검투사는 투박하다는 평을 듣고 만다.
무릇 진정한 예술가라면 다채로운 고문으로 무대를 준비해 긴장감을 차츰차츰 고조할 줄 알아야 한다.
fluff.zh: 那些杀戮手段过于残忍的角斗士，显得何其粗鄙。唯有精心铺设种种折磨，以此积蓄张力，最终引爆那令人心醉神迷的高潮——这才是真正艺术家的标志。

description.en:
**DRUKHARI** model only. While the bearer’s unit is wholly within 6" of a friendly **DRUKHARI TRANSPORT**:

■ Models in the bearer’s unit have the Stealth ability.
■ Each time a ranged attack targets the bearer’s unit, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.
**DRUKHARI** model only. The bearer’s unit is always Empowered – you do not need to spend any Pain tokens to activate that unit’s Pain abilities.

**DRUKHARI** model only. Each time you spend 1 Pain token to Empower the bearer’s unit in the Shooting phase, select one friendly **DRUKHARI TRANSPORT** within 6" of the bearer’s unit; until the end of the phase, each time that **TRANSPORT** makes an attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

**ARCHON** model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can do one of the following:

■ Spend 1 Pain token and gain 1CP.
■ Roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

**DRUKHARI** model only. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy unit in the Fight phase, if that enemy unit was within range of one or more objective markers when the bearer’s unit was selected to fight, you gain 1 additional Pain token.

**SUCCUBUS** model only. Improve the Attacks and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 1. Each time the bearer’s unit is selected to fight, you can spend 1 Pain token; if you do, until the end of the phase, improve the Attacks and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 2 instead.

**HAEMONCULUS** model only. Once per battle, in your Shooting phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, you can spend 1 Pain token. Then, each enemy unit within 12" of the bearer must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if you spent 1 Pain token. Each time a **PSYKER** unit fails that test, it suffers 3 mortal wounds.
**DRUKHARI** model only. Each time the bearer’s unit disembarks from a **TRANSPORT**, until the end of the turn, enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.

**HARLEQUINS** or **DRUKHARI** model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, if the bearer starts the battle embarked within a **DEDICATED TRANSPORT**, that **DEDICATED TRANSPORT** has the Scouts 9" ability.

**HARLEQUINS** or **DRUKHARI** model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Deep Strike ability. Each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, if that unit is currently losing the wager, until the end of the turn, you can re‑roll Charge rolls made for that unit.
**HARLEQUINS** model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Stealth and Infiltrators abilities.

**DRUKHARI** model only. In your Command phase, you can do one of the following:

■ If your **DRUKHARI** units are currently losing the wager, you can gain 1 Pain token. If you do, **DRUKHARI** units from your army are now winning the wager.
■ If your **DRUKHARI** units are currently winning the wager, you can discard 1 Pain token. If you do, **HARLEQUINS** units from your army are now winning the wager.

**SUCCUBUS** model only. At the start of your Command phase, after selecting which Combat Drugs will be active for your army, roll one D6 and consult the Combat Drugs list (see Detachment Rule). The result rolled applies to the bearer’s unit until the start of your next Command phase in addition to any other Combat Drugs that are active for your army. If you randomly select one that is already active for your army, it has no additional effect.

**SUCCUBUS** model only. Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer’s unit have the Fights First ability.
**SUCCUBUS** model only. Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.
**SUCCUBUS** model only. Improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 1.
**HAEMONCULUS** model only. Each time the bearer uses its Fleshcraft ability, you can return up to D3+3 destroyed Bodyguard models to the bearer’s unit instead of D3+1.
**HAEMONCULUS** model only. The bearer’s weapons have the **[ANTI‑BEAST 2+]** and **[ANTI‑MONSTER 4+]** abilities.
**HAEMONCULUS** model only. Add 1 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic and add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

**HAEMONCULUS** model only. Add 3" to the range of the bearer’s Fear Incarnate ability, and each time a friendly **DRUKHARI** unit within 9" of the bearer fails a Battle‑shock test or is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1 Pain token.
**ARCHON** model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 3+. At the start of either player’s Command phase, you can spend 1 Pain token: if you do, the bearer regains all of its lost wounds.
**ARCHON** model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Deep Strike ability, and you can target the bearer’s unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP.

**ARCHON** model only. At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, select up to three **KABALITE WARRIORS** and/or **HAND OF THE ARCHON** units from your army; those units gain the Infiltrators ability.
**ARCHON** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in that unit by 1.

In your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when you select this model’s unit to shoot or fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower that unit. While that unit is Empowered, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.
Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly **DRUKHARI** unit that is Battle‑shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle‑shocked.
Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. The first time the bearer makes a melee attack that destroys an enemy model, after all the bearer’s attacks have been resolved, until the end of the battle, add an additional 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons.

You cannot re‑roll invulnerable saving throws made for the bearer. The first time an invulnerable saving throw made for the bearer is failed, until the end of the battle, the bearer has no invulnerable save.

fluff.en: Archons lead their kabals in battle with a mixture of malevolent cunning, arrogant self‑assuredness and breathtaking martial skill. To these qualities, they add an arsenal of esoteric weaponry and wargear that enable them to fight wreathed in concealing shadows, drag the souls from their victims’ bodies, and reduce enemies to desiccated ashes with a single blow.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **COURT OF THE ARCHON** ■ **HAND OF THE ARCHON** ■ **INCUBI** ■ **KABALITE WARRIORS**

description.en: In your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when you select this unit to shoot or fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, each time this unit shoots or fights, after it has resolved its attacks, if one or more enemy models were destroyed as a result of those attacks, one model in this unit regains up to 3 lost wounds (if all models in this unit have their starting number of wounds and this unit is below its Starting Strength, 1 model is returned to this unit with 3 wounds remaining).

Each time you spend 1 Pain token to Empower a friendly unit within 9" of this unit, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if one or more models in this unit are not equipped with a spirit vortex: on a 5+, you gain 1 Pain token.

**Designer’s Note:** *Pain tokens you spend for reasons other than Empowering a unit do not trigger this ability.*

loadout.en: **Every Cronos is equipped with:** spirit syphon; spirit-leech tentacles.

wargear.en: Any number of models can each be equipped with 1 spirit vortex.

fluff.en: Like other Engines of Pain, the Cronos is a grisly amalgam of stimm‑fed flesh and biomechanical implements shielded by a burnished carapace. Haemonculi create the Cronos to act as a parasite. Its esoteric syphons leech its victim’s life essence, leaving them as husks before projecting the stolen vitality to other Drukhari.

description.en: In the Fight phase, when you select this model’s unit to fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower that unit. While that unit is Empowered, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.
While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a Pile‑in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

Each time this model makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, you can re‑roll the Hit roll. If that target is Below Half‑strength, you can re‑roll the Wound roll as well.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Executioner’s demiklaives.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Stalking the battlefields of realspace with a singular and murderous focus, Drazhar fights in utter silence. His bladework is phenomenal, his skill peerless. His only desire appears to be killing for killing’s sake, for he hacks a bloody path through mighty champions and luckless dregs alike, reducing all to butchered corpses with the same contemptuous ease.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **INCUBI**

description.en: In your Command phase, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this model’s unit. Each time you do, you can return up to D3+1 destroyed Bodyguard models to that unit.

While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1. In addition, in the Battle‑shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, if such an enemy unit is below its Starting Strength, it must take a Battle‑shock test.
In your Command phase, if one or more models from your army with this ability are on the battlefield, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1 Pain token.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** stinger pistol; Haemonculus tools and scissorhands.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: *Wielding horrific torture implements from their oubliettes and laboratories, Haemonculi drift like sinister predators through the midst of battle. They direct their covens of twisted monstrosities and pain adepts while hungrily seeking out fresh subjects for their hideous fleshcrafting, spreading terror through the foe with the detached fascination of true connoisseurs.*

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **WRACKS**

description.en: In your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when you select this unit to shoot or fight, you can spend 1 Pain token to Empower this unit. While Empowered, weapons equipped by models in this unit (excluding blast pistols, blasters and dark lances) have the **[LETHAL HITS]** and **[PRECISION]** abilities.

At the start of the first battle round, select one objective marker on the battlefield. Until the end of the battle, while this unit is within range of that objective marker, unless this unit is Battle‑shocked, models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save and an Objective Control characteristic of 3.
While the bearer’s unit is not Battle‑shocked, add 1 to the bearer’s Objective Control characteristic.
The bearer’s unit has the **SMOKE** keyword.
Once per turn, the first time a saving throw is failed for a model in the bearer’s unit, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.
If this unit has a Leader unit attached to it during the Declare Battle Formations step, that Leader unit gains the Scouts 7" ability.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** splinter rifle; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: 1 Kabalite Agent equipped with a splinter rifle can be equipped with 1 stimm‑needler. This model’s splinter rifle cannot be replaced.
1 Kabalite Agent’s splinter rifle can be replaced with 1 splinter pistol and 1 razorflail.
1 Kabalite Agent’s splinter rifle can be replaced with 1 pain sculptors.
1 Kabalite Agent’s splinter rifle can be replaced with 1 shardcarbine.
1 Kabalite Agent’s splinter rifle can be replaced with 1 stinger pistol.

1 Kabalite Agent’s splinter rifle can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 blaster ◦ 1 shredder
